evidence: The paper explicitly uses permutation importance: "The importance of each variable was assessed based on the command argument importance = 'permutation'". This is robust to impurity bias. Main conclusions derive from Bayesian regression models; the random forest is a "complementary method to further investigate associations" to identify which taxa drive relationships established by the primary analysis. Features are 1597 mixed-type cASVs (bacteria, parasites, fungi) with some unclassified members.
